Skills.Name: Corrosion
Skills.Description: Acid mastery. Acid-element spells deal +25% damage when the target is already Acidic. Open with AcidSpray or PoisonSpit, then stack acid spells for compounding damage. Synergizes with the acid_plus_organic material reaction.

Powers.Name: Etch
Powers.Description: +50% melee damage on Acidic targets, applied as bonus Acid damage. The acid weakens armor and flesh; your blade etches through the dissolved layer.
